name: @malloydata/malloy-filter
description: Parsers for the Malloy filtering sub-languages

scripts.build: npm run codegen && tsc --build && npm run generate-flow
scripts.clean: tsc --build --clean && rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo .*.digest && rimraf src/lib/* dist @flowtyped
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
